MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Greer M. Smith, Esq., for Tipton Managment Company, Inc., Robert Flores, Manager of Empress Hotel. Nathaniel B. Jones in propria persona.
*The case came on regularly as scheduled for a settlement conference today. Case settled. A stipulated judgment was signed in open court. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris, Clerks: P. Dias/Dianne Boffi, Reporter: Adonis Duffy
